languages.text: {n}Сервочерепа выстраиваются перед вами, словно приглашая выбрать, какой именно вас интересует в первую очередь.{/n}
{n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルたちは、どれについて最初に知りたいかを選ばせるかのように、あなたの前に一列に並んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}サーヴォスカルたちは、どれについて最初に知りたいかを選ばせるかのように、あなたの前に一列に並んだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Servoschädel reihen sich vor dir auf, als wollten sie dich einladen, denjenigen zu wählen, über den du als Erstes etwas erfahren möchtest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Servoschädel reihen sich vor dir auf, als wollten sie dich einladen, denjenigen zu wählen, über den du als Erstes etwas erfahren möchtest.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les servocrânes s'alignent devant vous, vous invitant à désigner celui auquel vous souhaitez adresser vos questions en premier.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les servocrânes s'alignent devant vous, vous invitant à désigner celui auquel vous souhaitez adresser vos questions en premier.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los servocráneos se sitúan en fila delante de ti, como invitándote a que escojas al que más te interese conocer mejor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los servocráneos se sitúan en fila delante de ti, como invitándote a que escojas al que más te interese conocer mejor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}三颗伺服头骨在你面前排成一排，仿佛在邀请你选择感兴趣的头骨。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skulls line up before you as if inviting you to choose the one you are interested in learning about first.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmeletler, en çok merak ettiğini seçmeni istercesine karşında sıralanıyor.{/n}
